rationale: Owner ruling R10 (AskUserQuestion interview, Claude Code session, 2026-07-17, America/Sao_Paulo) freezes PREREG v0.2 as the owner-frozen pre-registration of the Tranche B pilot by exact digest identity. The only permitted edit is the status line, preserving 'no exposure authorized' until the pre-exposure gate is signed. Per the ruling's operative effect, the lineage search may terminate complete once the scoring/key-arc actors, artifacts, reads, and deliveries are registered against the closed manifest, with the owner's partial cross-check read recorded truly and the veiled dimensions terminating as named unknowns. No scoring event, provider call, key-content exposure, or merge is authorized, and the pre-exposure gate remains unsigned.
